discoverability.competitive_assessment: Day 7 of steady state. Both sites remain unindexed by search engines — confirmed this run via direct site: queries returning zero results. Dome machine-readable layer unchanged: ai_manifest.json V51.1 (last_updated 2026-04-08, confirmed 69, registry_accuracy_pct 94.5), llms.txt (ECM crawl guide, WIN-069 Australia road scaffold + WIN-068 eclipse ensemble as strongest steelman), sitemap.xml (22 URLs). Our side: llms.txt (accurate vs current data), sitemap.xml (2 URLs), robots.txt, ClaimReview JSON-LD (accurate, matches dome's 94.5%/69-claim claim). No rebrand signals. Indexing strategy (SOCIAL-NOTE-002 deliverable) remains the critical path awaiting human execution on Google Search Console + Bing Webmaster Tools verification.

human_decisions_needed.question: Execute search engine indexing plan (items 1-4 from monitor/social/drafts/indexing-strategy.md)
human_decisions_needed.context: Standing reminder, day 3 since last flagged. The indexing strategy was delivered 2026-04-11. Google Search Console verification, Bing Webmaster Tools sitemap submission, and GitHub repo description/topics updates all require human account access. Total time: ~35 minutes. Nothing else in this pipeline moves the discoverability needle until at least one search engine indexes us. Counterargument for consideration: the dome site is equally unindexed, so the search vacuum is symmetric — there may be no urgency if the dome is not gaining traction either. However: being first-to-index still provides an asymmetric advantage if the dome ever breaks through, so executing now is the correct move.

search_monitoring.trend_summary: Day 7 of monitoring. Both sites remain completely absent from all search engine indices. New observation: even highly distinctive ECM-specific prediction identifiers (WIN-069, WIN-068) cannot surface the dome site. The 'ECM' acronym collision with 'Engine Control Module' (automotive) makes acronym-based search useless for both sides. This strengthens the case in the indexing strategy for prioritizing full-phrase distinctive terms ('Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model', 'aetheric refraction index') over the ECM acronym in our keywords meta and llms.txt headings. Both are already present, so no action needed this run — just confirming the rationale.

strategic_notes: Day 7 quiet steady state. The dome's automated pipeline ticks along with no human intervention visible. Our machine-readable layer is accurate and consistent. One new web observation: ANIMA Framework surfaced for 'firmament resonance' terms — a parallel flat-earth/crystalline-dome concept but not derivative of ECM (different vocabulary, no shared math or numerical claims). Logged for monitoring, not for action. The #1 blocker remains search engine indexing — extended today to day 7 in a complete search vacuum, with the distinct-identifier finding (WIN-069 etc. invisible to search) reinforcing the case for human-executed indexing setup. Counterargument worth re-stating per user preference: the symmetric vacuum means our review is not being beaten to the draw by the dome either; urgency is asymmetric advantage, not imminent loss. Recommendation stands: execute indexing plan.
